_template_note: This is the PUBLIC schema template for private holdout packs. It contains NO actual teacher-only content. Copy this to benchmarks/private-holdout-pack/holdout-manifest.json and fill in real episodes locally.

meta.honesty_note: This pack contains teacher-only evaluation material. It is not a sealed certification exam. It is a local holdout evaluation path for honest teacher-only scoring.

intended_use: iteration delta measurement on sealed material
